---
name: Protocol change
about: Propose a change to the core rules, skill semantics, or gate behavior
labels: protocol
---

**The problem observed** (a real failure or friction — not a hypothetical)

**The proposed rule** (the shortest imperative that would have prevented it)

**Evidence** (transcript excerpts, diffs, reproducible steps)

**Context cost** (why this line earns its place in an always-on file / skill)
